tokenisation.sentence_rule: split on [.?!]+ with empty segments discarded

feature_definitions.sentence_count: Number of non-empty sentence segments after sentence split.
feature_definitions.sentence_length_variance: Population variance of sentence token counts.
feature_definitions.punctuation_density: Count of punctuation marks divided by character count.
feature_definitions.unique_word_ratio: Unique token count / total token count.
feature_definitions.repeated_word_rate: Tokens occurring more than once / total token count.
feature_definitions.hapax_ratio: Tokens occurring exactly once / total token count.
feature_definitions.function_word_ratio: Function-word token count / total token count.
feature_definitions.adjacent_sentence_overlap_mean: Mean Jaccard overlap of token sets for adjacent sentence pairs.
feature_definitions.adjacent_sentence_overlap_variance: Variance of adjacent sentence Jaccard overlaps.
feature_definitions.mid_text_lexical_echo: Jaccard overlap between first-half and second-half token sets.
feature_definitions.repeated_bigram_rate: Repeated bigram types / total bigram types.
feature_definitions.repeated_trigram_rate: Repeated trigram types / total trigram types.
feature_definitions.sentence_initial_token_recurrence: Most frequent sentence-initial token count / sentence_count.
feature_definitions.sentence_terminal_token_recurrence: Most frequent sentence-terminal token count / sentence_count.
feature_definitions.paragraph_count: Count of paragraphs separated by blank lines; if none, value = 1.

null_model.purpose: Estimate structural expectation under preserved lexical inventory and preserved length, while destroying sequential order.

generation_method.method: Flatten tokens, shuffle uniformly with fixed RNG seed stream, repartition into original sentence lengths in original sentence-count shape.

null_model.sample_index_integer_definition: Zero-based row index of the sample in SCAR_AI_AUTH_DS01_sample_index.json. S_H_P01_01 = 0, S_A_P10_02 = 39. Row order is fixed at file creation and must not be changed after collection begins.
null_model.rng_seed_rationale: Seeds are arbitrary but fixed, chosen before collection begins. rng_seed_base 1337 and class_rng_seed 7331 are recorded here as pre-registered values. No optimisation of seed values was performed.

sample_level_scoring.method: For each feature, compute z-score of observed feature relative to null ensemble. Composite score = mean absolute z-score across selected coherence-sensitive features.

class_level_analysis.comparison_method: two-sided permutation test on difference in group means
class_level_analysis.secondary_metric_inference_policy: Secondary metrics are descriptive in Dataset 01 unless a later version explicitly declares inferential use and a correction policy.

PASS: class comparison completed without protocol breach
PARTIAL: execution valid but one or more samples replaced or flagged
deterministic run passes but class comparison inconclusive
dataset complete but class separation does not exceed null expectation

non_goals: This dataset does not prove universal AI detection.
This dataset does not identify model family from output alone.
This dataset does not establish legal admissibility in all jurisdictions.
This dataset is a controlled transfer proof only.
notes: Sentence segmentation is intentionally simplified for Dataset 01 and is treated as a frozen preprocessing approximation rather than a linguistic parser.
